item.title: 海力士市值突破 1 万亿美元
item.guid: 海力士市值突破-1-万亿美元
item.description:
SK Hynix's stock price once rose 11% during trading, with its market capitalization reaching 1605.72 trillion Korean Won, equivalent to approximately 7 trillion Chinese Yuan at current exchange rates, breaking the $1 trillion USD threshold. Over the past year, SK Hynix's stock price has cumulatively increased by over 1019%, mainly due to the continuous surge in demand for HBM high-bandwidth memory. 海力士盘中股价一度上涨 11%，市值达到 1605.72 万亿韩元，按现汇率约合 7 万亿元人民币，突破 1 万亿美元门槛。过去一年，海力士股价累计上涨超过 1019%，主要来自 HBM 高带宽内存需求持续升温。

SK Hynix thus becomes another chip company in the global semiconductor/tech industry to reach the "trillion-dollar spotlight moment," following giants like Nvidia, Microsoft, TSMC, and Broadcom. 海力士由此成为继英伟达、微软、台积电、博通等巨头之后，全球半导体行业/科技界又一迎来「万亿美元高光时刻」的芯片企业。

item.title: 阿里调整十三薪发放方式
item.guid: 阿里调整十三薪发放方式
item.description:
Alibaba yesterday issued an all-staff letter, stating that starting from fiscal year 27, the original "thirteenth-month salary" will revert to its essence as an annual bonus, adjusted to "Moving Forward Together Annual Bonus," and will be distributed along with each fiscal year's performance annual bonus. The year-end bonus will consist of two parts, "Moving Forward Together Annual Bonus" and "Performance Annual Bonus," listed separately. 阿里巴巴昨日发布全员信，自 27 财年起，原十三薪将回归年奖本质，调整为「并肩前行年奖」，并与每财年的绩效年奖一起发放，年终奖由「并肩前行年奖」和「绩效年奖」两部分组成、单独列示。

Alibaba's original 13th-month salary was usually distributed from December to January of the following year. After being merged with the year-end bonus, the distribution time will be postponed to April to May. 阿里原十三薪通常在每年 12 月至次年 1 月发放，与年终奖合并后，发放时间顺延至 4 月至 5 月。

The all-staff letter also mentioned that because the original 13th-month salary cycle is a calendar year and the annual bonus cycle is a fiscal year, the first "Shoulder-to-Shoulder Progress Annual Bonus" will be distributed in the bonus month of 2027. If an employee is on duty from January 1, 2026, to March 31, 2027, they will receive a 1.25-month Shoulder-to-Shoulder Progress Annual Bonus. 全员信还提到，因原十三薪周期为自然年、年奖周期为财年，第一次「并肩前行年奖」将于 2027 年奖发放月发放。若员工 2026 年 1 月 1 日至 2027 年 3 月 31 日均在岗，将获得 1.25 个月的并肩前行年奖。

item.title: 多家 AI 平台回应「高考期间答题受限」传闻
item.guid: 多家-AI-平台回应「高考期间答题受限」传闻
item.description:
According to Red Star News, in response to online discussions about "AI tools being disabled during the college entrance examination," several AI platforms have responded. Doubao customer service stated that Doubao can be used normally during the college entrance examination, but similar functions such as photo-based problem solving and Q&A will be disabled, and corresponding restrictions will be displayed on the page during the exam. 据红星新闻报道，针对「高考期间 AI 工具将禁用」的网络讨论，多家 AI 平台给出了回应。豆包客服表示，高考期间豆包可正常使用，但拍题答疑等类似功能会被禁用，考试期间页面会显示对应限制。

Tencent staff said that during last year's college entrance examination, Yuanbao had explicitly stated that it would not answer questions during the exam and suspended service requests related to the college entrance examination. Baidu's relevant business head said that they have not yet received notification of restrictions on some functions of Baidu Wenxin during the college entrance examination; iFlytek staff said that there is no definite news yet, but as long as it is a large model, there should be restrictions. 腾讯工作人员称，去年高考期间元宝已经明确考试期间不答题，并暂停涉及高考的服务请求。百度相关业务负责人表示，暂未收到高考期间百度文心部分功能限制服务的通知；科大讯飞工作人员称，目前还没有确切消息，但只要是大模型，应该都会有限制。

The report reviewed similar settings during last year's college entrance examination: Tencent Yuanbao had prompted that image recognition and summarization could not be used during the college entrance examination period, Alibaba Tongyi App showed that the photo-based problem-solving service was temporarily closed, and tools like Quark, Doubao, and Kimi also imposed restrictions on exam-related images or questions. 报道回顾了去年高考期间的类似设置：腾讯元宝曾对识图总结提示高考时段无法使用，阿里通义 App 显示拍照讲题服务暂时关闭，夸克、豆包、Kimi 等工具也对考试相关图片或题目作出限制。

item.title: 英伟达退役沿用约 20 年 GeForce 控制面板的游戏驱动支持
item.guid: 英伟达退役沿用约-20-年-GeForce-控制面板的游戏驱动支持
item.description:
According to IT Home, Nvidia released the GeForce Game Ready 610.47 WHQL driver on May 26 local time, and announced that the classic NVIDIA Control Panel officially canceled Game Ready and Studio driver support. 据 IT 之家报道，英伟达当地时间 5 月 26 日发布 GeForce Game Ready 610.47 WHQL 驱动，并宣布经典 NVIDIA 控制面板正式取消 Game Ready 和 Studio 驱动支持。

Nvidia stated that after the NVIDIA App update, control panel functions for GeForce users have been migrated to the new client. The installed NVIDIA Control Panel can still be used, but new drivers no longer maintain corresponding functions for GeForce consumer cards. 英伟达称，NVIDIA App 更新后，面向 GeForce 用户的控制面板功能已经迁移到新客户端。已安装的 NVIDIA 控制面板仍可使用，但新驱动不再面向 GeForce 消费卡维护对应功能。

Professional card users are temporarily unaffected by this adjustment. Nvidia stated that RTX PRO professional cards will continue to retain Control Panel support until professional functions are migrated to the NVIDIA App. The GeForce Control Panel, used for about 20 years, will gradually exit the consumer-side main interface. 专业卡用户暂时不受这一调整影响。英伟达表示，RTX PRO 专业卡仍会在专业功能迁移至 NVIDIA App 之前继续保留控制面板支持。沿用约 20 年的 GeForce 控制面板将逐步退出消费端主界面。

item.title: 伯克利法学院收紧学生使用 AI 规则
item.guid: 伯克利法学院收紧学生使用-AI-规则
item.description:
According to Reuters, the University of California, Berkeley School of Law's new AI policy will take effect this summer, restricting students from using chatbots in coursework and exams. Related discussions have already sparked controversy in legal education and law firm internship settings. 据路透社报道，加州大学伯克利法学院的新 AI 政策将于今年夏季生效，限制学生在课程作业和考试中使用聊天机器人。相关讨论已经在法律教育和律所实习场景中引发争议。

Publicly leaked policy explanations show that Berkeley Law School focuses its restrictions on stages such as concept ideation, outlining, drafting, revision, editing, translation, and exam use, reasoning that legal education still requires students to independently complete reasoning and writing training. However, some writing refinement is still allowed to use AI. 公开流出的政策说明显示，伯克利法学院把限制重点放在概念构思、提纲、起草、修改、编辑、翻译和考试使用等环节，理由是法律教育仍需要学生独立完成推理和写作训练。不过，部分写作润色仍允许使用 AI。

item.title: 快手一季度收入 337 亿元，可灵 AI 同比增长超 300%
item.guid: 快手一季度收入-337-亿元，可灵-AI-同比增长超-300%
item.description:
Kuaishou Technology yesterday released its first-quarter earnings report for the period ended March 31 this year, 快手科技昨日发布截至今年 3 月 31 日止第一季度业绩公告，

During the period, total revenue was RMB 33.7 billion, a year-on-year increase of 3.4%; Keling AI revenue exceeded RMB 650 million, a year-on-year increase of over 300%, with an annualized revenue run rate (ARR) of nearly US$500 million. According to IFRS standards, profit for the period was RMB 2.91 billion, a year-on-year decrease of 27.0%.

  • Online marketing service revenue was RMB 19.6 billion, a year-on-year increase of 9.3%; 线上营销服务收入 196 亿元，同比增长 9.3%；
  • Live streaming revenue was RMB 8.5 billion, a year-on-year decrease of 13.5%; other service revenue, including Keling AI, was RMB 5.6 billion, a year-on-year increase of 15.9%; 直播收入 85 亿元，同比下降 13.5%；包含可灵 AI 在内的其他服务收入 56 亿元，同比增长 15.9%；
  • Gross profit margin narrowed from 54.6% in the same period last year to 51.2%, and operating profit margin was 10.7%, both showing a decline, mainly due to increased sales costs and increased R&D expenses (up 9.8% year-on-year to RMB 3.62 billion). 毛利率由去年同期 54.6% 收窄至 51.2%，经营利润率为 10.7%，均有所下滑，主要受销售成本上升及研发开支增加（同比 +9.8% 至 36.2 亿元）影响。

Keling AI was the main growth highlight this quarter. The Keling AI 3.0 series models, launched in February this year, support full-modal input and output. Its 'Baseball Live' special effect feature drove it to the top of the App Store overall charts in 42 countries and regions. Kuaishou's average daily active users reached 412.7 million, and monthly active users reached 771.7 million. 可灵 AI 是本季度最主要的增长亮点。今年 2 月上线的可灵 AI 3.0 系列模型支持全模态输入输出，「棒球现场」特效功能带动其登顶 42 个国家和地区 App Store 总榜。快手应用平均日活跃用户达 4.127 亿，月活跃用户达 7.717 亿。

item.title: YouTube 将 AI 标签移到视频主界面
item.guid: YouTube-将-AI-标签移到视频主界面
item.description:
According to The Verge, YouTube announced adjustments to its AI content disclosure method, moving the "AI" label from the video description area to a more prominent position. For regular long videos, the label will appear below the player and above the description area; for Shorts, it will be displayed as a video overlay. 据 The Verge 报道，YouTube 宣布调整 AI 内容披露方式，把「AI」标签从视频描述区移到更醒目的位置。普通长视频的标签会显示在播放器下方、描述区上方；Shorts 则会以视频叠层形式展示。

This adjustment targets video content that is "realistic" or "substantially modified by AI." In the past, viewers needed to expand the description area and check "How this content was made" to see disclosure information; the new label directly states AI and is accompanied by an information icon. YouTube stated that non-realistic, animated, or slightly modified content can still have disclosures viewed in the expanded description. 这次调整针对「逼真」或「有实质 AI 改动」的视频内容。过去，观众需要展开描述区并查看「这段内容如何制作」才能看到披露信息；新标签直接写明 AI，并配有信息图标。YouTube 表示，非写实、动画或轻微修改内容仍可在展开描述中查看披露。

YouTube will also launch new internal identification signals this month. If a creator does not actively disclose, but the system detects significant realistic AI use in a video, the platform will automatically add an AI label. Creators can update the disclosure status in YouTube Studio; YouTube 还将在本月推出新的内部识别信号。如果创作者没有主动披露，但系统检测到视频存在显著的写实 AI 使用，平台会自动加上 AI 标签。创作者可以在 YouTube Studio 更新披露状态；

However, if generated using YouTube's own AI tools such as Veo and Dream Screen, or if the file contains C2PA metadata proving it was entirely generated by AI, the label will be retained. 但使用 YouTube 自家 Veo、Dream Screen 等 AI 工具生成，或文件包含 C2PA 元数据证明完全由 AI 生成时，标签会保留。

item.title: 保时捷拟把年产能压至约 20 万辆
item.guid: 保时捷拟把年产能压至约-20-万辆
item.description:
According to German business newspaper Handelsblatt, Porsche's new CEO Michael Leiters is preparing to downsize the company, maintaining an annual production capacity of approximately 200,000 vehicles, and hopes to restore operating profit margins to 10% to 15% by 2030. 据德国《商报》报道，保时捷新任 CEO Michael Leiters 正准备缩小公司规模，把年产能维持在约 20 万辆，并希望到 2030 年把营业利润率恢复至 10% 至 15%。

Porsche sold approximately 280,000 vehicles last year, over 30,000 fewer than the previous year; sales continued to decline by 15% in the first quarter of this year. 保时捷去年销量约 28 万辆，同比少卖超过 3 万辆；今年一季度销量继续下滑 15%。

The report states that Porsche is negotiating cost reductions with its employee committee, and layoffs may focus on the Weissach Development Center. The center has approximately 5,200 employees, and insiders say up to a quarter of positions could be affected. 报道称，保时捷正与员工委员会谈判削减成本，裁员重点可能落在魏斯阿赫研发中心。该中心约有 5200 名员工，内部人士称多达四分之一岗位可能受影响。

item.title: 林海滨重返字节 Seed 团队
item.guid: 林海滨重返字节-Seed-团队
item.description:
According to KnowFuture, Lin Haibin, former head of large model training at ByteDance, has returned to the Seed team to continue his work related to large model training. Lin Haibin joined SSI, founded by former OpenAI chief scientist Ilya Sutskever, in December last year, returning in less than half a year after leaving. 据知潜 KnowFuture 消息，原字节跳动大模型训练负责人林海滨已回归 Seed 团队，继续负责大模型训练相关工作。林海滨去年 12 月曾加入 OpenAI 前首席科学家 Ilya Sutskever 创立的 SSI，从离开到回归不到半年。

The report states that during his time at ByteDance, Lin Haibin was primarily responsible for the underlying technology of large model training, leading the distributed training system framework, participating in the development of GPU recommendation training systems and ByteCCL collective communication, and also spearheading the veRL open-source training framework. 报道称，林海滨在字节期间主要负责大模型训练底层技术，牵头分布式训练系统框架，参与过 GPU 推荐训练系统和 ByteCCL 集合通信研发，也主导过 veRL 开源训练框架。

item.title: Figure AI 与 Catalyst Brands 启动仓储人形机器人合作
item.guid: Figure-AI-与-Catalyst-Brands-启动仓储人形机器人合作
item.description:
Catalyst Brands and Figure AI yesterday announced a commercial partnership, with the first phase launching at Catalyst's Distribution Logistics Center in Reno, Nevada. The goal of the collaboration is to use humanoid robots for supply chain automation, improving warehousing efficiency and scalability. Catalyst Brands 与 Figure AI 昨日宣布商业合作，首阶段在 Catalyst 位于内华达州 Reno 的 Distribution Logistics Center 启动。合作目标是将人形机器人用于供应链自动化，提升仓储效率和可扩展性。

Both parties will first identify repetitive, labor-intensive tasks suitable for humanoid robot intervention. Figure stated that its next-generation humanoid robots will prioritize assisting with the sorting process of the Joey Pouch sorting system, including pipeline work in inbound, sorting, and packing systems. 双方将先寻找适合人形机器人介入的重复、体力密集任务。Figure 表示，其下一代人形机器人将优先协助 Joey Pouch 分拣系统的排序流程，包括入库、分拣和打包系统中的流水线工作。

item.title: 长鑫科技科创板 IPO 过会
item.guid: 长鑫科技科创板-IPO-过会
item.description: According to Caixin, the STAR Market Listing Committee of the Shanghai Stock Exchange yesterday approved the initial public offering application of CXMT Group Co., Ltd. CXMT is a domestic mass producer of general-purpose DRAM, and this IPO aims to raise approximately $3.96 billion, or about 28.4 billion yuan. 据财新报道，上交所科创板上市委昨日审议通过长鑫科技集团股份有限公司首发上市申请。长鑫科技是国内通用型 DRAM 量产厂商，本次 IPO 拟融资约 39.6 亿美元，折合约 284 亿元人民币。

item.title: 💡 Spotify CEO：受控的 AI 音乐比盗版和无授权生成更可取
item.guid: 💡-Spotify-CEO：受控的-AI-音乐比盗版和无授权生成更可取
item.description:
According to The Guardian, Spotify CEO Alex Norström yesterday defended the company's entry into AI-generated music. 据《卫报》报道，Spotify CEO Alex Norström 昨日为公司进入 AI 生成音乐辩护。

In an interview with the Financial Times, he stated that Spotify is trying to offer a "controlled" alternative, allowing musicians to consent to the use of their work and earn revenue, thereby avoiding piracy or unauthorized use by AI tools. 他在接受《金融时报》采访时表示，Spotify 试图提供一种「受控」替代方案，让音乐人能够同意作品被使用并获得收益，避免作品被盗版或被无授权 AI 工具使用。

Last week, Spotify reached a licensing agreement with Universal Music Group, which will allow subscribers to create AI-generated covers and remixes in the future. Norström stated that there have already been numerous unauthorized attempts externally, and the platform needs to incorporate licensing, consent, and payment mechanisms into product design in advance. 上周，Spotify 与环球音乐集团达成授权协议，未来将允许订阅用户用 AI 创作翻唱和混音版本。Norström 称，外部已经出现大量违规尝试，平台需要把许可、同意和付费机制提前放进产品设计中。

The solution he proposed is to integrate AI music into a licensing, consent, and payment framework, allowing generated content to leave an authorized trail within the platform. The report mentioned that related tools would charge additional fees and allow a song to be expanded into more cover or remix versions. 他给出的方案是把 AI 音乐纳入许可、同意和付费框架中，让生成内容在平台内留下授权链路。报道提到，相关工具会收取额外费用，并允许一首歌曲被扩展为更多翻唱或混音版本。

item.title: 1899 元起，雷鸟 GT 系列与 V4 正式发布
item.guid: 1899-元起，雷鸟-GT-系列与-V4-正式发布
item.description:
ThunderSoft Innovation yesterday held its summer new product launch event at TCL Chinese Theatre in Hollywood, officially unveiling the AR viewing glasses GT series and the new generation AI shooting glasses V4. 雷鸟创新昨日在 TCL 好莱坞中国剧院举办夏季新品发布会，正式推出 AR 观影眼镜 GT 系列与新一代 AI 拍摄眼镜 V4。

The GT series focuses on a cinema-level viewing experience, divided into two models, GT and GT Max, priced at 1899 yuan and 2599 yuan respectively. GT 系列主打影院级观影体验，分为 GT 与 GT Max 两款，售价分别为 1899 元和 2599 元。

  • GT Max features the Peacock Light Engine 3.0 Max, utilizing a glass-plastic hybrid prism optical module, with a field of view of 59° and an equivalent viewing size of 267 inches, weighing 78g; GT offers a 201-inch giant screen experience, weighing 68g; GT Max 搭载孔雀光引擎 3.0 Max，采用玻塑混合棱镜光模组，视场角达 59°，等效观影尺寸为 267 英寸，机身重量 78g；GT 提供 201 英寸巨幕体验，机身重量 68g；
  • Both products are equipped with dual-layer Micro-OLED display technology and a self-developed image quality chip Vision 4000, and feature a self-developed spatial computing chip Zone 360, supporting hovering large screens and three spatial anti-shake modes; 两款产品均搭载双层 Micro-OLED 显示技术与自研画质芯片 Vision 4000，并配备自研空间计算芯片 Zone 360，支持悬停大屏与三种空间防抖模式；
  • In terms of audio, the GT series is jointly tuned with Bang & Olufsen, featuring a four-speaker system and supporting hardware-level head-tracking spatial audio. With the ThunderSoft Magic Box 2 Dolby Vision Edition, this series becomes the only AR glasses set currently supporting Dolby Vision video playback. 音频方面，GT 系列与 Bang & Olufsen 联合调校，搭载四扬声器系统并支持硬件级头部追踪空间音频。通过雷鸟魔盒 2 杜比视界版，该系列成为目前支持杜比视界视频播放的 AR 眼镜套组。

V4 is an iterative product of V3, with upgrades focusing on AI response speed, battery life, shooting capabilities, and protection level, starting at 2199 yuan: V4 是 V3 的迭代产品，重点针对 AI 响应速度、续航、拍摄能力与防护等级进行升级，售价 2199 元起：

  • Features a Qualcomm Snapdragon AR1 and Hengxuan BES2800 dual-chip collaborative architecture, with a wake-up time of 0.2 seconds and AI response time of 2.1 seconds. 采用高通骁龙 AR1 与恒玄 BES2800 双芯协同架构，唤醒时间 0.2 秒，AI 回答时间 2.1 秒
  • Battery capacity increased by 57% compared to the previous generation, allowing for up to 11.5 hours of continuous music playback, over 2 weeks of continuous standby, and 80% charge in 25 minutes with in-box fast charging. 电池容量较上一代提升 57%，连续播放音乐可达 11.5 小时，连续待机超 2 周，盒内快充 25 分钟可充至 80%。

    • Equipped with the industry's first 1:1 large-sensor square sensor, with a single pixel photosensitive area increased by 109% compared to IMX681;

    The memory combination is 4GB + 64GB, and it achieves IP67 dust and water resistance for the first time.

item.title: 蔚来 ES9 上市，49.8 万元起
item.guid: 蔚来-ES9-上市，49.8-万元起
item.description:
NIO yesterday released its technology executive flagship SUV, the NIO ES9, with deliveries starting on May 28th. First, let's look at the prices: 蔚来昨日发布科技行政旗舰 SUV 蔚来 ES9，新车将于 5 月 28 日开始交付。先看价格：

    The Executive Luxury Edition starts at 498,000 yuan for the complete vehicle purchase, or 390,000 yuan with the BaaS battery subscription model;

    The Executive Signature Edition starts at 558,000 yuan for the complete vehicle purchase, or 450,000 yuan with BaaS;

    The Horizon Special Edition starts at 628,000 yuan for the complete vehicle purchase, or 520,000 yuan with BaaS.

The ES9 uses a 102kWh battery, with a CLTC range of 620km for the Executive Luxury Edition, and 600km for the Executive Signature Edition and Horizon Special Edition; the vehicle is equipped with a 900V dual electric drive, a peak power of 520kW, and accelerates from 0 to 100km/h in 4.3 seconds. ES9 采用 102kWh 电池，行政豪华版 CLTC 续航 620km，行政签名版和地平线特别版为 600km；车辆搭载 900V 双电驱，峰值功率 520kW，百公里加速 4.3 秒。

In terms of configuration, the ES9 offers second-row aviation zero-gravity executive seats, dual-side executive tables, an 8.8L electric smart refrigerator, two 16-inch NIO Link exclusive executive screens, rear-wheel steering, dual-chamber air suspension, external valve CDC, sapphire full-focal length AR-HUD, and 31 high-performance sensing hardware. 配置上，ES9 提供二排飞航零重力行政座椅、双侧行政桌案、8.8L 电动开合智能冰箱、2 × 16 英寸 NIO Link 专属行政屏、后轮转向、双腔空悬、外置阀 CDC、蓝宝石全焦段 AR-HUD 和 31 个高性能感知硬件。

item.title: 全新问界 M9 发布，47.98 万元起
item.guid: 全新问界-M9-发布，47.98-万元起
item.description:
Yesterday, the all-new Wenjie M9 was officially released, offering two body types: standard size and Ultimate Extended Edition, with prices starting from 479,800 yuan. The standard version has a length of 5285mm and a wheelbase of 3125mm; the Ultimate Extended Edition has a length of 5402mm and a wheelbase of 3236mm. 昨天，全新问界 M9 正式发布，提供标准尺寸和 Ultimate 领世加长版两种车身，售价 47.98 万元起。标准版车长 5285mm、轴距 3125mm；Ultimate 加长版车长 5402mm、轴距 3236mm。

The new car offers extended-range and pure electric versions, with a maximum CLTC range of 750km for the pure electric version and a maximum comprehensive range of 1405km for the extended-range version. The new car is equipped with an 800V dual silicon carbide high-voltage platform, a combined system horsepower of 903 hp, 0-100km/h acceleration in 3.99 seconds, and features the full-blooded Turing platform, ±8° rear-wheel steering, a six-lidar matrix, and the ADS 5 assisted driving system. 新车提供增程和纯电版本，纯电 CLTC 续航最高 750km，增程版综合续航最高 1405km。新车搭载 800V 双碳化硅高压平台，系统综合马力 903 匹，零百加速 3.99 秒，并配备满血途灵平台、后轮 ±8° 转向、六激光雷达矩阵和 ADS 5 辅助驾驶系统。

The Ultimate version also adds configurations such as four zero-gravity seats, swivel seats, privacy glass, and a starlight headliner. Ultimate 版本还加入四张零重力座椅、旋转座椅、隐私玻璃和星空顶等配置。

item.title: B&O 与 Fragment 推出四款联名音频产品
item.guid: B&O-与-Fragment-推出四款联名音频产品
item.description:
According to IT Home, Bang & Olufsen has collaborated with Hiroshi Fujiwara's Fragment Design to launch four custom audio products, starting from 3,198 yuan. All products in this series feature Fragment's iconic double lightning bolt logo and brand lettering. 据 IT 之家报道，Bang & Olufsen 联名藤原浩 Fragment Design，推出四款定制音频产品，售价 3198 元起。该系列产品均加入 Fragment 标志性的双闪电标识和品牌字样。

    Beosound A1 Portable Speaker: 3,198 yuan;

    Beoplay H100 Over-ear Headphones: 15,480 yuan;

    Beosound Shape Wall-mounted Speaker: Japanese price 1,066,300 JPY, approximately 45,500 RMB;

    Beosystem 9000c Audio System: Sold only in Japan, priced at 10,662,900 JPY, approximately 455,000 RMB.

The brand states that this collaboration marks the first time highly specialized anodizing and hand-polishing techniques have been applied to some portable products. The Fragment collaboration allows B&O's high-end audio products to further enter the realm of trend collection and limited lifestyle consumption. 品牌称，这次联名首次把高度专业化的阳极氧化与手工抛光工艺应用于部分便携作品。Fragment 联名让 B&O 的高端音频产品进一步进入潮流收藏和限量生活方式消费场景。

item.title: 8.99 万元起，星尘智能发布绳驱机器人 T1
item.guid: 8.99-万元起，星尘智能发布绳驱机器人-T1
item.description:
Stardust Intelligence yesterday released its new generation of rope-driven AI robot T1, with a starting price of 89,900 yuan, and shipments planned to begin on June 1st. This also marks the company's first time bringing the price of high-precision operation robots into the sub-90,000 yuan range. 星尘智能昨日发布旗下新一代绳驱 AI 机器人 T1，起售价 8.99 万元，计划于 6 月 1 日开始发货。这也是该公司首次将高精细操作机器人的价格拉入 9 万元以内区间。

The T1 robot stands 1.55 meters tall, weighs approximately 66 kilograms, has 23 degrees of freedom (excluding the end effector), and a single-arm load capacity of 5 kilograms. T1 整机高 1.55 米，重约 66 公斤，拥有 23 个自由度（不含末端），单臂负载 5 公斤。

The product continues Stardust Intelligence's rope-driven transmission solution. The official statement claims that the rope-driven structure has lower friction and continuous motion, which can reduce information loss caused by backlash friction and mechanical noise compared to traditional rigid structures, thereby transmitting more complete real-time force control data to the AI. 产品延续星尘智能的绳驱传动方案，官方称绳驱结构摩擦更低、运动连续，相比传统刚性结构可减少齿隙摩擦与机械噪声带来的信息损耗，从而向 AI 传递更完整的实时力控数据。

item.title: 蚂蚁首款 AI 眼镜 Willit 低调上线淘宝
item.guid: 蚂蚁首款-AI-眼镜-Willit-低调上线淘宝
item.description:
Ant Group has quietly launched its first self-developed AI glasses, Willit, which are now available on Taobao. The accompanying mobile app, Willit AI, has also been simultaneously released on app stores. The product's main selling entity is Beijing Ant Zoro Technology Co., Ltd. 蚂蚁集团低调推出首款自研 AI 眼镜 Willit，已在淘宝开售，配套手机应用 Willit AI 也同步上架应用市场。产品销售主体为北京蚂蚁佐罗科技有限公司。

Willit is priced at 899 yuan, positioned more as a lightweight entry-level AI glasses product. Relevant information on the product page indicates that these glasses focus on daily wear, voice, and AI assistant capabilities, with device connection and feature management handled through an app. Willit 定价 899 元，定位更接近轻量 AI 眼镜入口产品。商品页相关信息显示，这款眼镜主打日常佩戴、语音和 AI 助手能力，并通过 App 完成设备连接与功能管理。

item.title: Bonsai Image 4B 把本地生图带到 iPhone
item.guid: Bonsai-Image-4B-把本地生图带到-iPhone
item.description:
PrismML has released the Bonsai Image 4B series of image generation models, primarily designed to run diffusion models on mobile phones and local devices. Official data states that generating a 512×512 image takes approximately 9.4 seconds on an iPhone 17 Pro Max and about 6 seconds on a Mac M4 Pro. PrismML 发布 Bonsai Image 4B 系列图像生成模型，主打在手机和本地设备上运行扩散模型。官方数据称，在 iPhone 17 Pro Max 上生成一张 512×512 图像约需 9.4 秒，在 Mac M4 Pro 上约需 6 秒。

Volume and memory are key highlights: the 1-bit version reduces the Transformer volume to 0.93GB, shrinking it to 1/8.3 of the 7.75GB full-precision FLUX.2 Klein 4B; when generating 512×512 images, the 1-bit and Ternary versions have average active memory of 1.5GB and 1.96GB respectively, while the full-precision version uses 11.74GB. 体积和内存是亮点：1-bit 版本把 Transformer 体积压到 0.93GB，较 7.75GB 的全精度 FLUX.2 Klein 4B 缩小至 8.3 分之一；生成 512×512 图像时，1-bit 与 Ternary 版本平均活跃内存分别为 1.5GB 和 1.96GB，而全精度版本为 11.74GB。

PrismML states that the Ternary version retains approximately 95% accuracy at a volume of 1.21GB. PrismML 称，Ternary 版本在 1.21GB 体积下保留约 95% 的准确性。

item.title: 拼多多一季度营收 1062 亿元，净利润同比下降 15%
item.guid: 拼多多一季度营收-1062-亿元，净利润同比下降-15%
item.description:
Pinduoduo yesterday released its first-quarter financial report for the period ending March 31, 2026. Revenue for the quarter was 106.2 billion yuan, a year-on-year increase of 11%; net profit attributable to ordinary shareholders was 12.5 billion yuan, a year-on-year decrease of 15%; Non-GAAP net profit was 14.1 billion yuan, a year-on-year decrease of 17%. 拼多多昨日发布截至 2026 年 3 月 31 日的一季度财报。该季度营收为 1062 亿元，同比增长 11%；归属于普通股股东的净利润为 125 亿元，同比下降 15%；Non-GAAP 净利润为 141 亿元，同比下降 17%。

In terms of revenue structure, transaction service revenue was 56.3 billion yuan, a year-on-year increase of 20%; online marketing services and other revenue was 49.9 billion yuan, compared to 48.7 billion yuan in the same period last year. On the cost side, cost of revenue was 46.9 billion yuan, a year-on-year increase of 15%; R&D expenses were 4.4 billion yuan, compared to 3.6 billion yuan in the same period last year. 收入结构上，交易服务收入为 563 亿元，同比增长 20%；在线营销服务及其他收入为 499 亿元，去年同期为 487 亿元。成本端，收入成本为 469 亿元，同比增长 15%；研发费用为 44 亿元，去年同期为 36 亿元。

Management defined this year in the financial report as the starting point for deep adjustments in business, internal processes, and organization. Co-Chairman and Co-CEO Chen Lei stated that the company will assume its responsibilities as a platform enterprise; Co-Chairman and Co-CEO Zhao Jiazhen said that supply chain investment will be a core strategic priority. 管理层在财报中把今年定义为业务、内部流程和组织的深度调整起点。联席董事长兼联席 CEO 陈磊表示，公司会承担平台企业责任；联席董事长兼联席 CEO 赵佳臻则称，供应链投资将是核心战略优先级。

item.title: 微信小游戏月活跃用户超 5 亿
item.guid: 微信小游戏月活跃用户超-5-亿
item.description:
According to a report by Yicai, at the WeChat Mini Game Developer Conference, officials disclosed that the monthly active users of WeChat Mini Games have exceeded 500 million, with users spending an average of 60 minutes per day on mini-games. 据第一财经报道，在微信小游戏开发者大会上，官方披露微信小游戏月活跃用户量已经超过 5 亿，用户平均每天在小游戏中花费 60 分钟。

The conference also disclosed developer-side data: the WeChat Mini Game developer community exceeds 500,000, and over 300 mini-games have quarterly revenue exceeding 10 million yuan. Mini-games have evolved from lightweight entertainment entry points into stable game distribution and commercialization channels within the WeChat ecosystem. 大会还披露了开发者侧数据：微信小游戏开发者群体超过 50 万，单季度流水超过 1000 万元的小游戏超过 300 款。小游戏已经从轻量化娱乐入口，延伸成微信生态内稳定的游戏分发和商业化渠道。

item.title: 疲劳驾驶认定新规不覆盖出租车和网约车
item.guid: 疲劳驾驶认定新规不覆盖出租车和网约车
item.description:
According to Jiemian News, the "Rules for Determining Fatigue Driving by Motor Vehicle Drivers" will be implemented on June 1, to be used in the investigation and handling of road traffic accidents to determine fatigue driving behavior by motor vehicle drivers. 据界面新闻报道，《机动车驾驶人疲劳驾驶认定规则》将于 6 月 1 日实施，用于道路交通事故调查处理环节中认定机动车驾驶人疲劳驾驶行为。

Regarding the question of whether "a passenger motor vehicle driver who has accumulated more than 8 hours of driving time within 24 hours should be deemed to be driving fatigued" covers taxis and ride-hailing services, the person responsible for drafting the new rules stated that this provision is based on the "Safety Management Regulations for Road Passenger Transport Enterprises." After confirmation with the Ministry of Transport, this regulation applies to road passenger transport operations such as scheduled bus services, chartered bus services, and tourist transport, and does not involve taxis and ride-hailing services . 对于「客运机动车驾驶人在 24 小时内累计驾驶时间超过 8 小时，应认定为疲劳驾驶」是否覆盖出租车和网约车的疑问，新规起草负责人称，这一条依据《道路旅客运输企业安全管理规范》，经向交通运输部确认，该规范适用于班车客运、包车客运、旅游客运等道路旅客运输经营活动， 不涉及出租汽车和网约车 。

For truck drivers, the standard does not set a specific continuous driving time, but applies the general regulations for motor vehicles: continuous driving of a motor vehicle for more than 4 hours without stopping for rest, or stopping for less than 20 minutes, should be deemed fatigue driving. 对于货车驾驶人，标准没有设置特别连续驾驶时间，适用机动车一般规定：连续驾驶机动车超过 4 小时未停车休息，或停车休息时间少于 20 分钟，应认定为疲劳驾驶。

item.title: 小红书获世界杯独家转播权益
item.guid: 小红书获世界杯独家转播权益
item.description:
Yesterday, LatePost reported that Xiaohongshu has acquired the exclusive broadcasting rights for the 2026 World Cup and has listed this event as one of its most important community projects this year. Xiaohongshu has set two goals internally for the World Cup project: to boost daily active users from the current over 170 million to 200 million, and to expand the platform's user structure through sports content. 昨天，晚点 LatePost 报道称，小红书已获得 2026 年世界杯独家转播权益，并把这项赛事列为今年最重要的社区项目之一。小红书内部为世界杯项目设定了两个目标：推动日活跃用户从目前超过 1.7 亿冲击 2 亿，并借体育内容扩展站内用户结构。

The report mentioned that Xiaohongshu decided to participate in the World Cup copyright negotiations at the beginning of the year and ultimately secured the relevant rights. The World Cup tournament lasts approximately 40 days, and the platform needs to simultaneously handle live broadcast products, traffic distribution, community interaction, and commercialization. 报道提到，小红书年初即决定参与世界杯版权谈判，最终拿下相关权益。世界杯赛期约 40 天，平台需要同时处理直播产品、流量分发、社区互动和商业化承接。

item.title: 《玩具总动员 5》发布终极预告
item.guid: 《玩具总动员-5》发布终极预告
item.description:
Disney Pixar animated film "Toy Story 5" is scheduled to be released simultaneously in mainland China and North America on June 19, and the ultimate trailer has been released. The trailer centers on the conflict between traditional toys and digital technology, showcasing an antagonist army composed of 50 glitchy Buzz Lightyears. The film's plot features the cowgirl doll Jessie as the protagonist, with veteran characters like Woody and Buzz Lightyear returning. 迪士尼皮克斯动画电影《玩具总动员 5》已定档 6 月 19 日在中国内地与北美同步上映，并发布终极预告，预告片把传统玩具与数字科技之间的冲突作为主轴，并展示 50 个故障版巴斯光年组成的反派军团。影片剧情以牛仔玩偶翠丝为主角，胡迪、巴斯光年等元老角色回归。

This marks the return of the "Toy Story" series after seven years. The new film incorporates changes in children's entertainment methods into the story, making old toys face competition from electronic products and digital life. 这是《玩具总动员》系列时隔七年的回归。新片把儿童娱乐方式变化放进故事内部，让老玩具面对电子产品和数字生活的竞争。

item.title: 尼古拉斯 · 凯奇主演《暗影蜘蛛侠》上线流媒
item.guid: 尼古拉斯-·-凯奇主演《暗影蜘蛛侠》上线流媒
item.description:
According to blogger "Watchmen Hollywood," the live-action standalone series "Spider-Noir" has officially launched on Amazon Prime Video, with all episodes released at once. 据博主「守望好莱坞」消息，《暗影蜘蛛侠》真人独立剧集已正式登陆 Amazon Prime Video，全季内容一次性上线。

The series is adapted from the Marvel Comics character Spider-Noir, with the protagonist originating from the "colorless" Spider-Noir image in the animated film "Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse." The series is set in a retro film noir style, telling the story of the city's only superhero forced to confront his past. The series also offers both black and white and color versions for viewers to choose from. 该剧改编自漫威漫画角色 Spider-Noir，主角源自动画电影《蜘蛛侠：平行宇宙》中「没有色彩」的暗影蜘蛛侠形象。剧集以复古黑色电影风格为基调，讲述这位城中唯一超级英雄被迫直面过去的故事。剧集同时提供黑白与彩色两个版本供观众选择。
